# didComplete(error:)

**Instance Method**

Informs the client that the task completed.

## Declaration

```swift
func didComplete(error: (any Error)?)
```

## Parameters

- **error**: `nil` if the task completed successfully; otherwise, an error that caused the task to fail.
title: didComplete(error:)
